case_title: THAN SOE KYAW ET AL VS. PETER G. MIKHAIL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,084.86 FILED BY KYAW, THAN SOE NWACHUKU, KELECHI PHAM, HALLEN REASO, JEWEL NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT MIKHAIL, PETER G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KYAW, THAN SOE NWACHUKU, KELECHI PHAM, HALLEN REASO, JEWEL NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKHAIL, PETER G. $2,465.51 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.51, PLAINTIFFS ARE CHARGED $800.00 FOR PAINT/WOOD, $57.43 FRIDGE SHELF AND $200.00 CLEANING COSTS (SEE NOTES) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KELECHI NWACHUKU (PREVIOUS CO-TENANT) (SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON 10-7-21) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REASO, JEWEL NICOLE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KELECHI NWACHUKU (PREVIOUS CO-TENANT) (SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON 10-7-21) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHAM, HALLEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. 864675 - PLAINTIFFS THAN SOE KYAW AND KELECHI NWACHUKU ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS HALLAN PHAM AND JEWEL NICOLE REASO ARE NOT PRESENT BUT ARE REPRESENTED BY KELECHI NWACHUKU. DEFENDANT PETER G. MIKHAIL IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KYAW, THAN SOE NWACHUKU, KELECHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKHAIL, PETER G. $2,465.51 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.51, PLAINTIFFS ARE CHARGED $800.00 FOR PAINT/WOOD, $57.43 FRIDGE SHELF AND $200.00 CLEANING COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$0.00 SERVED SEP-09-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIKHAIL, PETER G.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON OCT-06-2021)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, -SIGNED BY ALL 4 PLANTIFFS AS TO DEFENDANT MIKHAIL, PETER G.
